meta.title: Iddikud n addabara wan ijjuch n awadim

hero.title: Iddikud n addabara wan ijjuch n awadim
hero.lead: IATF ikyad tiɣir n addabara tan tin ijjuch n accessibility id izjaran daɣ derhan n tiditt
support: War t ilkem i almaɣna n harat fuk mucham muchakil n tiditt, wi id ifal nen d awa ijjan awen harat eqqalan harat n asinti

actions.label: Ašanzi ən Discord dǎɣ edag ənes

intro: Izarajan fuk ijjan fal akayad olahan

items.label: Ehan wan intaned
items.body: Adakal ən əmik wan daw-iyan fal adigiš adabaratan atiwasanan.

items.label: E-mail tan
items.body: Əktab tarədawt as: {{contact.requestsEmail}}Talɣiwen tin e-mail addobat nat ad aqqil nat ikitban n addinat darat akayad d amukin

items.label: Anmizlay
items.body: Assənta da, afal awen eqal hulen asohen.Adarat ən assəməsədəw eqal harwa dǎɣ edag iyan ən akayad.

guidance.title: Dat asissiki ən adabarat
paragraphs: IATF itaj alxidmat net daɣ addinat, aratan addoben a tan ijjichan tolas ad aqqilan ikitban n aratan n addinat daɣ taggayt tan GitHub, fal website wen meɣ fuk nasan

War eha achareɣa tan win awadim, ismawan n telefon, isalan win assexat meɣ isalan n musnat n awadim fal addinat wi axdam nen s teknoloji tan alɣidmaten a fal war eha derhan tolas war t addobat IATF asiwil net
IATF itaj isalan n awadim war n ila derhan data n afissar n isalan win addaror

review.title: Ikayadan ən haratan
paragraphs: Asukni n arɣum war eha ach-ak fal ijjuch net
IATF isawadan tiɣir fal alxidmat, tudabat, alfayda d as alxidmăt taqqal daɣ repository n addinat
Tiɣir tiyyad addobat nat ankur, asidu meɣ amutti data ijjuch

fields.name: ContactRoute
fields.label: Tajililwăyt n ihăndăgan
fields.helper: Daɣ immik wa s addobat akarach n akayad?

fields.name: Isalan win tartit
fields.label: Isalan win tartit
fields.helper: Alkad wan e-mail meɣ Discord i akayad

fields.name: awal
fields.label: Daɣ awal
fields.helper: Daɣ awalan n afor n awadim, a fal ijja awen

fields.name: ExtraContext
fields.label: Taɣelit ta maqqorat
fields.helper: Asibdad haratan iyad dak wi taganen aliɣi ən tarha: awa fal eqal ayfan, almitalan, isalan, aniyat iknan ən əšiɣil, meɣ alɣisaban ən alwaq.

fields.name: openSourceConsent
fields.label: Eqal ahusken dǎɣ təwaƭ tan open source tan adinat?
fields.helper: Dumu tan wi ardahan aqqalan repository tan n addinat daɣ IATF
options: War eha ach-ak as ijja awen

items: Repository n addinat daɣ taggayt tan IATF GitHub
Engineer wa iknan alxidmat ikrasan ehan wan musnat
Licence tan copyleft i kod d isuj win addabara
Edag wan rejisir fal sit n IATF

header.title: Tamadilt təknat adatu taqal ayknan dǎɣ santo.

paragraphs: A fal tila derhan n tiditt n ijjuch tolas aɣil as ilzam ad eqqil harat n alxakum, azilzam i aɣ
